chapter_title.en: Chapter 33 – The fear and the hope

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مختلف فيه صحيح عند ي - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (41/ 8)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مختلف فيه صحيح عند ي - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (41/ 8)
text: اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ وَ لِمَنْ خافَ مَقامَ رَبِّهِ جَنَّتانِ قَالَ مَنْ عَلِمَ أَنَّ اللَّهَ يَرَاهُ وَ يَسْمَعُ مَا يَقُولُ وَ يَعْلَمُ مَا يَعْمَلُهُ مِنْ خَيْرٍ أَوْ شَرٍّ فَيَحْجُزُهُ ذَلِكَ عَنِ الْقَبِيحِ مِنَ الْأَعْمَالِ فَذَلِكَ الَّذِي خَافَ مَقَامَ رَبِّهِ وَ نَهَى النَّفْسَ عَنِ الْهَوَى .

en.hubeali: From him, from Ahmad, from Ibn Mahboub, from Dawood Al Raqqy,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws regarding the Words of Allahazwj Mighty and Majestic [55:46] And for the one who fears to stand before his Lord would have the two Gardens. Heasws said: ‘The one who knows that Allahazwj Sees him and Hears whatever he is saying, and he knows that whatever he does, be it from good or evil, so that would detain him from the ugly ones of the deeds, so that would be the one who fears to stand before Hisazwj Lordazwj, and has prevented himself from the personal desires’.
en.sarwar: 10. It is narrated from him (narrator of the Hadith above) from Ahmad from ibn Mahbub from Dawud al-Ruqiyy from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “About the words of Allah, the Most Majestic, the Most Holy, ‘For one who fears of the position of his Lord there are two gardens. ’[55:46] The Imam said, ‘One who knows that Allah sees him, hears what he says and knows what he does, good or evil, and it keeps him off wicked deeds, such person is the one who fears the position of his Lord and stops his soul from following his (negative) desires.’”
